side_effects.description: vascular flushing for 5-10 minutes after injection, goes away in less than 10 minutes
swelling and mild itching at injection site similar to mosquito bite, lasts about one hour
stronger/faster heart beat sensation, hearing blood flow in ears
severe nausea and vomiting with heart rate elevation to 140s resting for 30 minutes; occurred when combining Tadalafil, creatine, liquid glycerol with insufficient hydration before injection

protocol_notes: CJC-1295 No DAC variant. Duration: 3 months with no long-term issues. Administration: 2-3 hours after a meal, as close as possible to sleep onset. Critical: must maintain hydration (at least 2L water daily). Avoid combining with Tadalafil or other blood pressure-lowering compounds before injection. The flushing/histamine reaction is a normal vasodilation response.
